name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The iconic GG Supreme canvas makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 early autumn collection, reinterpreting a new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown bi-fold wallet is embellished with a modern floral pattern and the GG logo.
name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The iconic GG Supreme canvas makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 early autumn collection, reinterpreting a new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown bi-fold wallet is embellished with a modern floral pattern and the GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill slot
Model: 841146.
Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H); Open dimensions: 21cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 0.11kg
Color: Beige embossed leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
